_note: Prereq: the lab assumes a running hello-dcs (from earlier in the dev track) — the plan deploys one first (unquoted heredoc so the session's $DCS_REGISTRY expands). verify-quota / verify-oversized-pending rely on the Educates budget ResourceQuota being present and small enough to reject the oversized deploy; if CRC's budget quota differs they may need expect_fail.

steps.run:
oc apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: hello-dcs
  labels: {app: hello-dcs}
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector: {matchLabels: {app: hello-dcs}}
  template:
    metadata: {labels: {app: hello-dcs}}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: hello-dcs
        image: ${DCS_REGISTRY}/samples/hello-dcs:1.0
        ports: [{containerPort: 8080}]
        resources: {requests: {cpu: 50m, memory: 64Mi}, limits: {cpu: 100m, memory: 128Mi}}
EOF
oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
oc scale deployment/hello-dcs --replicas=3 && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
envsubst < ~/exercises/deployment-probes.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
oc rollout restart deployment/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
